mapper.sql: after_sale_id, after_sale_no, user_id, order_id, order_no, order_item_id, goods_id, goods_name, refund_amount, reason, description, reject_reason, after_sale_status, refund_no, handle_time, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into beyeah_mall_after_sale
after_sale_no, user_id, order_id, order_no, order_item_id, goods_id, goods_name, refund_amount, reason, description, reject_reason, after_sale_status, refund_no, handle_time, is_deleted, create_time, update_time,
#{afterSaleNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refundAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rejectReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{afterSaleStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{refundNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{handleTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.select: select from beyeah_mall_after_sale where after_sale_id = #{afterSaleId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select from beyeah_mall_after_sale where after_sale_no = #{afterSaleNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select from beyeah_mall_after_sale where order_item_id = #{orderItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
